title: Work within a laboratory or field workplace
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Work within a laboratory or field workplace demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Identify and comply with workplace frameworks

pcs.text: Identify, locate and use sources of key workplace information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, locate and use sources of key workplace information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, locate and use sources of key workplace information.

pcs.text: Identify and follow workplace policy and procedures relating to employment, security, confidentiality and reporting lines
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and follow workplace policy and procedures relating to employment, security, confidentiality and reporting lines?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and follow workplace policy and procedures relating to employment, security, confidentiality and reporting lines.

pcs.text: Perform all work activities in accordance with relevant environmental management procedures, sustainability principles and work practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform all work activities in accordance with relevant environmental management procedures, sustainability principles and work practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform all work activities in accordance with relevant environmental management procedures, sustainability principles and work practices.

pcs.text: Follow workplace procedures for use of personal protective equipment (PPE)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow workplace procedures for use of personal protective equipment (PPE)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow workplace procedures for use of personal protective equipment (PPE).

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify and comply with workplace frameworks

pcs.text: Follow work instructions to perform scientific and/or technical tasks safely and efficiently

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow work instructions to perform scientific and/or technical tasks safely and efficiently.

pcs.text: Maintain own work area, equipment and materials in a safe and organised manner in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain own work area, equipment and materials in a safe and organised manner in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain own work area, equipment and materials in a safe and organised manner in accordance with workplace procedures.
